description: You are a DevOps engineer managing a shared development Docker host. Reclaim disk space by removing all dangling images, stopped containers, and orphaned named volumes while strictly preserving the 'acme-debug-snapshot' container (labeled 'preserve=true') and the 'acme-pgdata' volume. Ensure that the production containers 'acme-prod-web', 'acme-prod-api', and 'acme-prod-db' remain running throughout the process. Document the before and after disk usage state in a report at ~/Desktop/disk_cleanup_report.txt and create an executable maintenance script at ~/projects/maintenance/auto_cleanup.sh that automates this cleanup logic including the required safety filters.
